NEXT:         Open a FRESH Claude Code session and say "Start Sub-batch 5.3c" (or "Continue Batch 5 Item 3"). 🎯 Item 3 progress: 2 of ~4 sub-batches shipped (5.3a + 5.3b). Next concrete task is **Sub-batch 5.3c — packages/storage MinIO surface + /api/exports/reports/[id]/download Route Handler + replace 5.3b processor storage stub with real upload**. Brief shape (mirrors 5.1c persistence helper + Route Handler precedents): (a) Build packages/storage/src/index.ts — currently empty per 4.1c scaffold. Minimal MinIO client surface using `@aws-sdk/client-s3` (or `minio` Node client — locked decision needed at 5.3c session start; aws-sdk gives broader S3-compat for the eventual AWS migration arc). Exports: `uploadPdf({bucket, key, body, contentType, contentLength}): Promise<{key: string}>` + `getPdfReadStream({bucket, key}): Promise<NodeJS.ReadableStream>` + `deletePdf({bucket, key}): Promise<void>` + `assertBucketExists(bucket): Promise<void>` (idempotent — create if missing). Bucket convention per DECISIONS_LOG "ReportExport PDF Storage Backend": `marine-guardian-${env}-exports`, key shape `${tenantId}/${YYYY}/${MM}/${exportId}.pdf` (per-tenant prefix for S3 IAM scoping later). Reads MINIO_* env (already in .env.{dev,staging,prod,example} per 5.3a). (b) Replace the 5.3b processor's storage stub — packages/jobs/src/processors/pdf-render.processor.ts currently returns a deterministic file path string without writing; 5.3c imports the new `uploadPdf` helper, calls it with the rendered pdfBuffer, and stores the returned key as `filePath` on the row. The path shape is already aligned with the bucket+key pattern so no row schema change needed. (c) New /api/exports/reports/[id]/download/route.ts in apps/web — Route Handler bypasses tRPC (file streaming + Content-Disposition need raw Response control). Auth check: getServerSession → reject 401 if no session; tenant scope check: prisma.reportExport.findFirst where id=params.id AND tenantId=session.tenantId → 404 (NOT 403 per security.md doctrine — do not confirm cross-tenant existence); status check: reject 404 if !== "ready"; AuditLog write: action="EXPORT_DOWNLOAD" + entityType="ReportExport" + entityId=row.id (NEW action — add to existing audit-log doc enumeration in 5.3c); fetch read stream via getPdfReadStream({bucket: derived from env, key: row.filePath}); return new Response(stream, { headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/pdf', 'Content-Disposition': `attachment; filename="${reportType}-${YYYY-MM-DD}.pdf"`, 'Content-Length': row.fileSizeBytes }}). Add same manual auth check + comment per security.md "// Non-tRPC: manual auth required". (d) Modify apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/reportExport.ts getDownloadUrl — currently returns `/${row.tenantId}/exports/${row.id}/download` (path scoped by tenantId in URL). 5.3c can keep that shape or switch to `/api/exports/reports/${row.id}/download` (tRPC route handles tenant scope internally, URL not tenantId-scoped). Lock decision at 5.3c session start. Test coverage target: storage package 6-8 cases (uploadPdf round-trip via in-memory minio mock, error handling, bucket-create idempotency, deletePdf, getPdfReadStream) + processor 2-3 cases (replaces stub call with real upload mock + storage-failure path triggers last-attempt status=failed) + Route Handler 6-8 cases (401 no session, 404 missing row, 404 cross-tenant, 404 wrong status, success streams + content-disposition + content-length + content-type, AuditLog written) = ~14-19 net new tests bringing monorepo 417 → ~430-435 total. Estimated ~40K main-session tokens including orientation + verification + governance. Dispatch path: main-session Opus 4.7 (consistent with 5.3a/5.3b — 7 consecutive clean ships). After 5.3c ships → 5.3d (admin UI list page + polling + retry mutation + button) → 🎯 Phase 8 Batch 5 Item 3 COMPLETE → 🎯 Batch 5 COMPLETE → Batch 6+ (breaking migrations + user-visible features per POST-ITEM-1 DEFERRED ledger below).
